meaning: 悉达多(佛教创始人释迦牟尼的本名,意为"义成就者")
examples: Then he went looking for Siddhartha.
It is where Siddhartha used to bathe.
Siddhartha became a fully awakened being - a Buddha.
Now many Buddhists accept that the one-time prince, Siddhartha Gautama, was born in a grove here some 26 centuries ago.
Siddhartha Sanyal, chief India economist with Barclays Capital, said he now expected the main interest rate to be cut to 7.75% from 8%.
